prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to changes specifically within the benefit system managed by the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP), which is responsible for England, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Scotland has its own devolved welfare system and benefits administration, making the content of this document not directly applicable to Scotland.
